messages.text: Hey! 👋 How can I help you explore our OnePromise AI Training Course? If you'd like to chat more in detail, just drop me your email and a quick note about what you're looking to learn, and our team will follow up.
can you connect me to the team
Sure thing! Can you share your email address and a quick line about what you’re hoping to learn or achieve with the course? Our team will reach out to you right away.
Thanks! Could you give me a quick description of what you’re hoping to focus on or achieve with the course? That way our team can tailor the follow‑up.
to learn about business in AI

Got it! Just to make sure our team can help you best—could you give a quick note on what specific aspect of “business in AI” you’re most interested in (e.g., strategy, marketing, product development, or startup scaling)? Then we’ll have the right people connect with you.

Great—thanks for the details! OnePromise’s AI Training Course has a strong “AI Business Strategy” module, and our team will reach out shortly to dive deeper into how you can build and grow AI‑driven initiatives. If you have any quick questions in the meantime, just let me know!

Hey there! 🚀 I hope you’re finding some time to dive into AI strategy thoughts. If you’d like a deeper playbook that blends strategy with real projects and mentor feedback, our **Professional** tier could be a great fit. No pressure—just let me know what you’re looking for, and I’ll gladly walk you through the next steps!

**Professional ($499)** – It adds the 12 advanced modules and real‑world projects that dive into AI strategy and business use‑cases. It gives you the depth you need beyond just fundamentals, with mentor feedback and live Q&A to keep you moving forward.

Hey again! 😊 Just checking in—if you’re still exploring how AI can shape your business strategy, our **Professional** track gives hands‑on projects and mentor feedback, plus a solid foundation from the Starter module. No rush, but if it sounds right, I’m happy to help you get started!
